records.m_Talk_ENG: You were bold when charging in. Why so desperate to flee now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were bold when charging in. Why so desperate to flee now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were bold when charging in. Why so desperate to flee now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nowhere left to run. Come on then, give me a real fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nowhere left to run. Come on then, give me a real fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nowhere left to run. Come on then, give me a real fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha Dam, can you feel it? The Tiger's growing stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha Dam, can you feel it? The Tiger's growing stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha Dam, can you feel it? The Tiger's growing stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It
8v seeks to transcend the shell of a Beast and become something greater, a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It
8v seeks to transcend the shell of a Beast and become something greater, a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It
8v seeks to transcend the shell of a Beast and become something greater, a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the goal, it's probably gathered plenty of power by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's the goal, it's probably gathered plenty of power by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the goal, it's probably gathered plenty of power by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The wound Yeonhwa inflicted on its neck still hasn't healed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The wound Yeonhwa inflicted on its neck still hasn't healed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The wound Yeonhwa inflicted on its neck still hasn't healed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll draw its attention. Aim for that spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll draw its attention. Aim for that spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll draw its attention. Aim for that spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. If we can land a strike there, we might have a shot at this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. If we can land a strike there, we might have a shot at this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. If we can land a strike there, we might have a shot at this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's flaunting that wound like bait. It knows we'll go for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's flaunting that wound like bait. It knows we'll go for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's flaunting that wound like bait. It knows we'll go for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Even if it's bait
8v we don't have a better option.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Even if it's bait
8v we don't have a better option.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Even if it's bait
8v we don't have a better option.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we sever its neck, all the power it gathered will become imaginary and disperse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we sever its neck, all the power it gathered will become imaginary and disperse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we sever its neck, all the power it gathered will become imaginary and disperse.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And beyond that barrier, there are still people who need protection
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And beyond that barrier, there are still people who need protection
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And beyond that barrier, there are still people who need protection
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this can protect them, then it's worth everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this can protect them, then it's worth everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this can protect them, then it's worth everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Protecting the greater good is noble and all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Protecting the greater good is noble and all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Protecting the greater good is noble and all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you're going to stake your life, shouldn't it be on the future you actually want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you're going to stake your life, shouldn't it be on the future you actually want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you're going to stake your life, shouldn't it be on the future you actually want?
